case_title: NELSON GUILLERMINO PEREZ OROZCO VS. IGOR ELGART

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OROZCO, NELSON GUILLERMINO PEREZ AS TO DEFENDANT ELGART, IGOR DBA SAN MATEO ROOFING AND MAINTENANCE CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OROZCO, NELSON GUILLERMINO PEREZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELGART, IGOR DBA SAN MATEO ROOFING AND MAINTENANCE CO. $6,595.41 PRINCIPAL, $51.22 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,871.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
